creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
xpad starts with all pads as grey text an no ability to create content of any type of note.

(xpad:3953): GLib-GObject-WARNING **: IA__g_object_set_valist: construct property "type" for object `XpadPad' can't be set after construction

Fix: 

not known how to fix.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/deskutils/xpad
sudo make install
run: /usr/local/bin/xpad
